title: Better Skies
description: Improving the skies with custom skyboxes for better realism.
body:
## Better Skies is a resource pack that adds realistic atmospheres to Minecraft.

Even though Minecraft can be a pretty game, it is not known to be very realistic. Its a very common desire to want to inject a little more realism into the game. While realistic atmospheres can be added using shaderpacks, the good ones are pretty performance intensive. 
And so the solution to this is a resourcepack. It is considerably lighter than a shaderpack while still upholding the goal is to add realistic atmospheres with comparatively little performance hit.

*   You will need **[NUIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)** for Minecraft versions above 1.20.1 and Better Skies V1.0+

All this resource pack does is change the sky so it should be compatible with other resourcepacks. Shader compatibility varies on a case by case basis.
Please don't ask me if a specific shader is compatible. [https://tryitands.ee/](https://tryitands.ee/)

Find us on Discord: [https://discord.gg/tdw3GQx27k](https://discord.gg/tdw3GQx27k)
